name: teagram-discord-bridge
description: Host-side Discord voice bridge: joins a voice channel with the KettleBot identity and pipes audio to the teagram Pipecat brain (/talk). Discord voice needs UDP, which the NemoClaw sandbox forbids by design, so this tiny shim owns only the media leg on the host — the brain (and, through it, the sandboxed OpenClaw agent) stays the mind.
//opus: Two Opus codecs on purpose. @discordjs/opus is the native (fast, low-jitter) codec prism-media prefers — it has no arm64 prebuild for recent Node ABIs, so it compiles from source on install (needs gcc/g++/make/python3; force with `npm rebuild @discordjs/opus --build-from-source`). opusscript is the pure-JS fallback prism-media uses if that native build is absent, so a toolchain-less box still works.
